# Mentra

> Mentra is an AI-powered Career OS. It turns a career goal into a personalized,
> week-by-week roadmap, then walks it with you: an AI mentor that remembers your
> journey, live sessions with real mentors, hands-on projects, and job matches.

Mentra is a web product. This domain (mentradev.sbs) is the public marketing site;
the product itself lives at https://app.mentradev.sbs and requires an account.
Everything on this domain is public marketing content and is free to quote or
summarize. Anything behind the app login is private user data and is not crawlable.

## How it works

Four steps, as described on the landing page:

1. **Tell us your goal** — a short onboarding captures your current level, skills, and target role.
2. **AI builds your roadmap** — a week-by-week plan of topics, tests, and projects in order.
3. **Learn with mentors** — practice with tests and projects, ask the AI coach, join live sessions.
4. **Land the role** — build a portfolio, track progress, apply to matched jobs.

## What's inside

- **AI roadmap** — personalized to your target role and level. Each topic unlocks subtopics and a completion test, and the plan re-plots itself as you finish milestones, rather than staying a static checklist.
- **AI mentor chat** — a career coach with continuous memory across sessions. It nudges you when you go quiet and can drop live-session invites directly into the chat.
- **Live sessions & recordings** — real-time video, chat, and raise-hand with mentors. Every session is recorded and available on demand.
- **Projects & graded assignments** — AI-personalized assignments scored 0–100, and portfolio-worthy projects tied to your roadmap.
- **Test-series ladder** — Beginner → Intermediate → Advanced ladders per topic, pinpointing what to review.
- **Job matching** — AI-discovered openings matched against your growing profile.
- **Progress tracking** — streaks, an activity heatmap, a skill radar, and an AI "where to focus" read of your activity.
- **Community** — public profiles, a follow graph, and an activity feed.

## Plans

- **Starter (free)** — AI roadmap, AI mentor chat, test-series and progress tracking. No credit card required.
- **Pro** — everything in Starter, plus live sessions with recordings, mentor bookings, and job matches.

## Key facts

- Who it's for: anyone building toward a role — first job, career switch, leveling up, or interview prep.
- No prior experience needed; the roadmap is built around your current level.
- The always-on chat mentor is AI. Live sessions and bookings connect you with real human mentors.
- Onboarding takes under 3 minutes and is free to start.

## Links

- [Landing page](https://mentradev.sbs/): full product overview, plans, and FAQ.
- [Open the app](https://app.mentradev.sbs/): sign in or create an account.
- [Enquiry form](https://mentradev.sbs/#enquiry): ask a question or get help onboarding.
